description.value:
Frequency once per day

You can launch a ball of plasma and stellar ejecta across the battlefield that explodes on impact, raining plasma and flame in a small area. Launch Plasma deals @Damage[3d6[fire]] damage in a 5-foot-radius burst within 60 feet. Each creature in the area must attempt a basic Reflex save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. On a critical failure, a creature also takes 3 persistent electricity damage.

At 7th level and every 2 levels thereafter, the fire damage increases by 1d6, and the persistent electricity damage increases by 1. At 17th level, the area increases to a 10-foot-radius burst.

Special If you're a volatile novian, Launch Plasma and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Mini-Nova]{Mini-Nova's} damage dice are both increased to d8s.
